framework.name: Common Public Digital Architecture Security (FDA)
framework.scope: Security requirements for common public digital architecture in Denmark including MitID, service platforms, data sharing, and municipal integration
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by FDA security domains: digital identity, data sharing, service platform, architecture security, and municipal integration.

controls.title: MitID integration for public services
controls.description: Public digital services must integrate with MitID as the primary identification solution for citizens and businesses.
controls.description_nl: Offentlige digitale tjenester skal integrere med MitID som primaer identifikationsloesning for borgere og virksomheder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend MitID Erhverv for virksomhedslogon. Implementer NSIS-sikringsniveauer baseret pa risikovurdering.

controls.title: NSIS assurance levels
controls.description: Public services must select NSIS assurance level (Low, Substantial, High) based on impact analysis of unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: Offentlige tjenester skal vaelge NSIS-sikringsniveau (Lav, Betydelig, Hoej) baseret pa konsekvensanalyse af uberettiget adgang.

controls.title: Federated identity management
controls.description: Public solutions must support federated identity management via SAML 2.0 or OpenID Connect for single sign-on.
controls.description_nl: Offentlige loesninger skal understotte foedereret identitetsstyring via SAML 2.0 eller OpenID Connect for single sign-on.

controls.title: Digital power of attorney and representation
controls.description: Systems must support digital power of attorney so citizens and businesses can be represented by others in public interactions.
controls.description_nl: Systemer skal understotte digital fuldmagt sa borgere og virksomheder kan repraesenteres af andre ved offentlige henvendelser.

controls.title: Security in data sharing between authorities
controls.description: Data sharing between public authorities must use approved infrastructures with access control, logging, and encryption.
controls.description_nl: Datadeling mellem offentlige myndigheder skal ske via godkendte infrastrukturer med adgangskontrol, logning og kryptering.

controls.title: Consent management for data sharing
controls.description: Systems sharing personal data across authorities must implement consent management in accordance with GDPR.
controls.description_nl: Systemer der deler personoplysninger pa tvaers af myndigheder skal implementere samtykkehaandtering i overensstemmelse med GDPR.

controls.title: Secure APIs for public data
controls.description: Public data APIs must be protected with authentication, authorization, rate limiting, and input validation.
controls.description_nl: Offentlige data-API-er skal beskyttes med autentifikation, autorisering, rate limiting og input-validering.

controls.title: Data classification for sharing
controls.description: Data shared between authorities must be classified and handled in accordance with the public information classification model.
controls.description_nl: Data der deles mellem myndigheder skal klassificeres og behandles i henhold til den offentlige informationsklassifikationsmodel.

controls.title: Integration with common public platforms
controls.description: Public IT solutions must integrate with relevant common public platforms (Service Platform, NemLog-in, Digital Post) via standardized interfaces.
controls.description_nl: Offentlige IT-loesninger skal integrere med relevante faellesoffentlige platforme (Serviceplatformen, NemLog-in, Digital Post) via standardiserede graenseflader.

controls.title: Service Platform security
controls.description: Integrations via the Service Platform must use certificate-based authentication and comply with the platform security requirements.
controls.description_nl: Integrationer via Serviceplatformen skal anvende certifikatbaseret autentifikation og overholde platformens sikkerhedskrav.

controls.title: Security as architectural principle
controls.description: Information security must be a fundamental architectural principle in all public IT solutions from design to operation.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhed skal vaere et grundlaeggende arkitekturprincip i alle offentlige IT-loesninger fra design til drift.

controls.title: Privacy by design in public solutions
controls.title_nl: Privacy by design i offentlige loesninger
controls.description: Public solutions must be designed with data protection by default (privacy by design and by default).
controls.description_nl: Offentlige loesninger skal designes med databeskyttelse som standard (privacy by design og by default).

controls.title: Use of open standards
controls.description: Public IT solutions must use open standards to ensure interoperability and avoid vendor lock-in.
controls.description_nl: Offentlige IT-loesninger skal anvende aabne standarder for at sikre interoperabilitet og undga leverandoerlaas.

controls.title: Security assessment of new technologies
controls.description: New technologies including AI and cloud must undergo a security assessment before adoption in public solutions.
controls.description_nl: Nye teknologier inklusiv AI og cloud skal gennemga en sikkerhedsvurdering foer adoption i offentlige loesninger.

controls.title: KomBit solutions and security
controls.description: Municipal IT solutions procured via KomBit must comply with common public architecture requirements including security standards.
controls.description_nl: Kommunale IT-loesninger anskaffet via KomBit skal overholde de faellesoffentlige arkitekturkrav inklusiv sikkerhedsstandarder.

controls.title: Municipal information security
controls.description: Municipalities must implement information security in accordance with ISO 27001 and common public security guidelines.
controls.description_nl: Kommuner skal implementere informationssikkerhed i overensstemmelse med ISO 27001 og de faellesoffentlige sikkerhedsretningslinjer.
